Article.ArticleTitle: Effects of training modalities on physiology, hematology, and performance in elite Ethiopian distance male athletes.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Sports Science, College of Natural Sciences, Addis Ababa University, P. O. Box 150435, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. nafnat1973@gmail.com.
Department of Sports Science, College of Natural Sciences, Addis Ababa University, P. O. Box 150435, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.
Department of Sports Science, College of Natural Sciences, Addis Ababa University, P. O. Box 150435, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: This study was approved by the Department of Sport Science, College of Natural and Computational Sciences, Addis Ababa University Research Ethical Committee (protocol EAF-2024-012, approval date: 07 January 2023). All participants provided informed consent, and procedures complied with the Helsinki Declaration. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
